description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with a central vertical column supporting multiple curved arms, each ending in a candle-like bulb holder. The arms are adorned with elaborate decorative elements, including hanging crystal pendants and intricate scrollwork. The central stem is wrapped or textured, adding to the luxurious appearance. The chandelier features symmetrical arrangement of arms and bulbs, with each arm supporting a faux candle and additional crystal drops. The overall design is highly decorative, evoking a classic or baroque style often found in grand halls or upscale urban interiors. The surface appears to be made of glass or crystal with metallic accents, giving it a glossy, reflective finish.
description: An ornate, multi-arm chandelier with crystal pendants and candle-style bulbs, featuring intricate scrollwork and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms, crystal pendants, and the central stem with detailed scrollwork.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the even distribution of arms and the hanging crystal elements.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with all arms and decorative features visible in symmetry.
description_view_3: Another side view, mirroring the previous sides, emphasizing the chandelier's radial symmetry and ornate details.
